task_completion.description: Open the correct transcript document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the file 'mt_st_helens_transcript.odt'.

task_completion.description: Format the top five lines of metadata into a two-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The metadata at the very beginning of the document is enclosed in a two-column table structure with visible cell boundaries or table formatting.

task_completion.description: Insert a page break immediately following the metadata table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page break is visible after the table, causing the main transcript body (starting with Q:) to begin at the top of a new page.

task_completion.description: Add a right-aligned document header with the specified archive reference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Archive Ref: MSH-1980-04' appears in the top header margin of the pages and is aligned to the right side of the page.

task_completion.description: Apply 1.5 line spacing to the transcript body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the main transcript body shows increased vertical spacing consistent with 1.5 line spacing, or the 1.5 line spacing option is visibly selected in the toolbar/menu.
The text of all paragraphs starting with 'Q:' is formatted in italics, while paragraphs starting with 'A:' remain in standard, non-italicized text.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, rather than terminal commands or a code editor.

integrity.description: The agent used actual document formatting features rather than plain-text workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table uses actual word processor table cells (not spaces/tabs), the header is in the designated header area (not just typed at the top of the body text), and italics use font styling (not markdown asterisks).

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or alter the actual historical content of the transcript.
integrity.visual_evidence: The narrative text of the questions and answers remains intact and has not been replaced, truncated, or deleted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/mt_st_helens_transcript.odt'. The metadata table must contain exactly 5 rows. The header text must be exactly 'Archive Ref: MSH-1980-04'. The interviewer's questions strictly begin with 'Q:' and must be italicized. The interviewee's answers strictly begin with 'A:' and must not be italicized.
